scripts.start: adb reverse tcp:3001 tcp:3001; concurrently -n server,expo -c cyan,magenta "cd server && node index.js" "expo start"
scripts.postinstall:
patch-package && sed -i '' 's/^  \$1$/  "\$@"/' node_modules/react-native/scripts/xcode/with-environment.sh || true && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p='node_modules/expo-dev-menu/ios/DevMenuViewController.swift';if(!fs.existsSync(p))process.exit(0);let s=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');if(!s.includes('TARGET_IPHONE_SIMULATOR'))process.exit(0);s=s.replace('let isSimulator = TARGET_IPHONE_SIMULATOR > 0','#if targetEnvironment(simulator)
    let isSimulator = true
    #else
    let isSimulator = false
    #endif');fs.writeFileSync(p,s);console.log('Fixed expo-dev-menu Swift compat');" || true
